meta.notes: Single canonical data source. Achievement wording is recruiter-optimised for impact and verbs. No metrics have been invented. metrics fields stay null until real numbers are supplied.

personal.location: 11 Union St, Auckland CBD, New Zealand
personal.visa_status: Post Study Work Visa, valid until May 2029

professional_summary.headline: Full Stack Developer
professional_summary.summary: Full Stack Developer with 6+ years building and shipping production Ruby on Rails and React applications across travel booking, vocational training, and cybersecurity, including senior and team lead roles. Owns features end to end, from architecture and APIs through to frontend delivery and production support, with hands-on experience in PCI-DSS compliant payments, multi-region systems, and regulatory reporting. Recently relocated to New Zealand and completing a Master of Software Engineering, with local industry experience gained through the programme.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
experience.context: Industry internship undertaken as part of the Master of Software Engineering programme at Yoobee Colleges. To be presented on the CV with this context so the role reads as an academic placement, not a step down in seniority.

achievements.description: Delivered review, rating, and recipe management features for a React Native and Django mobile application, fixing production defects and improving release stability.
Contributed across the full agile cycle, sprint planning, PR review, and releases, debugging cross-platform issues in both development and production environments.
Sole developer on the Work Skills RTO client platform, modernising a legacy Ruby on Rails and Angular training system and delivering new features across the product.

Designed and built an AVETMISS NAT reporting engine for the RTO that produced the distinct report formats required for Queensland, New South Wales, and national NCVER submissions, keeping the organisation compliant across all three jurisdictions.

Built the RTO's certificate and statement of attainment generation system, including a public verification portal that let employers and third parties confirm the authenticity of any issued document, reducing the risk of credential fraud.
Optimised the portfolios endpoint on the RTO platform by rewriting an inefficient SQL query and eliminating N+1 queries, cutting load time from roughly 2 minutes to about 30 seconds, a 75% reduction.
achievements.metrics: Portfolios endpoint load time reduced from ~2 minutes to ~30 seconds (about 75% faster, roughly 4x)

experience.title: Full Stack Ruby on Rails Developer

achievements.description: Developed features for Dradis Pro and Dradis Community Edition, a widely adopted open-source penetration testing reporting and collaboration platform used by security teams worldwide.
Built and hardened features in a production Ruby on Rails codebase serving hundreds of security teams across multiple countries.
achievements.metrics: Hundreds of security teams across multiple countries

achievements.description: Partnered with the team to scope, prioritise, and ship user-facing improvements to the Dradis experience.
Advanced from intern to Senior Software Engineer in 3.5 years on the strength of consistent delivery, going on to lead sprint planning, run code reviews, and mentor junior developers.
achievements.metrics: Promoted from intern to senior over 3.5 years

achievements.description: Helped build and integrate a PCI-DSS compliant Credit Card Vault into the WellTravel booking ecosystem, enabling secure card processing across a multi-region travel platform handling live financial transactions.
Integrated Stripe with 3D Secure, Paygate, and PayFast into the WellTravel booking system, processing live financial transactions across multiple regional markets.
Designed and built an internal GitHub backup tool in Ruby, using Octokit and the Google Cloud Storage gem to automate off-site backups of the organisation's repositories.
Architected a monorepo housing a Rails backend and a React frontend communicating over GraphQL, cutting deployment complexity and streamlining the developer workflow.
Built Elasticsearch-backed filtering and sorting for the WellTravel booking engine and extended the engine's React frontend to support it.
Built RESTful APIs with the Grape gem to power the mobile booking experience, supporting cross-platform use by end customers.
Drove a test-driven development practice, writing RSpec and Jest coverage across the codebase to raise and protect product quality.
Worked directly with WellTravel clients in Switzerland and South Africa, providing support and channelling their feedback into product improvements.
Led a development team as technical lead, owning sprint planning, providing hands-on coding support, running code reviews, and mentoring juniors within an ISO 27001 certified environment.

projects.name: GitHub Backup Tool
projects.description: An internal Ruby tool that automates off-site backups of GitHub repositories to Google Cloud Storage, using Octokit and the Google Cloud Storage gem.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering

education.institution: Saint Francis Xavier's Green Herald International School
